title: TRIBAL MEMBER SERVICES - 211info
text: CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF THE UMATILLA INDIAN RESERVATION TRIBAL MEMBER SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF General office for intake and information for services and programs. 46411 Timine Way Pendleton, OR 97801 Eligibility: Federally recognized tribal members Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-4pm Email (541) 429-7035 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 429-7035 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Umatilla County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 7:30am-4pm Services: Native American General Assistance Specialized Information and Referral * Native American Community Tribal Council Offices Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - HEAD START MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - FAMILY VIOLENCE SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF THE UMATILLA INDIAN RESERVATION
